summary: Spec review accepts bounded Stage 6 Core preview Result Envelope, expected change projection, failure classification, and ref association semantics.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm typecheck`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-177 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-177 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-177 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps preview projection in Core and excludes approval execution, true writes, submitted result, unknown outcome, reconciliation, and private material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to Core Result Envelope/Run Record/query/schema/self-check and item-specific carrier.
